_comment: Golden retrieval set for the civil-rights corpus. Each row is one query plus an `expect` block of assertions the runner checks against the live retrieval (rag/eval/run_eval.mjs). Assertions are deliberately loose where retrieval rank can legitimately shift between reingests (prefer top_speaker_substring / must_include_entry / min_top_score over brittle exact-rank checks) and tight only where a metadata filter pins the result. Entry numbers below were verified against public/rag/toc.json on 2026-06-01. See README.md in this directory for the assertion vocabulary and how to add a query.

queries.note: Canonical demo query (DEMO_SCRIPT.md). Open-ended thematic retrieval; the demo surfaces SNCC voices framing nonviolence as belief vs. method. Loose score floor only, the exact top voice can shift across reingests.

queries.query: nonviolence as a way of life rather than a strategy
queries.note: Nonviolence-as-belief framing. Deduped polyphonic check (at least 3 distinct interviewees, solid top score). An earlier draft asserted Joseph Echols Lowery (entry 66) must appear, sourced from an old MCP smoke test, but rerank no longer places him in the top 6 for this phrasing while still returning strong on-topic voices, so the brittle single-entry assertion was replaced with the polyphonic one.

Metadata-filter precision demo (DEMO_SCRIPT.md). The entry_number filter pins retrieval to Wheeler Parker, Jr. (entry 125), so both the top entry number and the speaker are deterministic and safe to assert exactly.

queries.query: the dreamer can be killed but not the dream
queries.note: Quote-finder pattern (DEMO_SCRIPT.md): a half-remembered paraphrase should resolve to the canonical primary source, Ralph David Abernathy in the Abernathy family interview (entry 28).

queries.query: bloody sunday edmund pettus bridge first-person account
queries.note: Alfred Moldovan (entry 133) describes the medical-team response on Bloody Sunday (DEMO_SCRIPT.md). Asserted as must_include rather than top-1 because several interviewees speak to this event and rank order is not guaranteed.

queries.query: bloody sunday edmund pettus bridge first-person account
queries.note: Same event, polyphonic view. dedupeByEntry should return one passage per interviewee; this row checks the deduped path yields at least three distinct voices on a heavily-covered event.

queries.query: sixteenth street baptist church bombing september 1963 four girls killed
queries.note: Topical event retrieval anchored to a specific dated atrocity (precompute_panels.mjs event slug 16th-street-baptist-bombing-1963). Score floor plus tier ceiling; no single speaker is canonical here.

queries.query: freedom summer mississippi 1964 voter registration freedom schools
queries.note: Freedom Summer is one of the most heavily covered campaigns in the corpus; the deduped query should comfortably surface three or more distinct interviewees.

queries.query: young SNCC organizers turning away from nonviolence toward Black Power
queries.note: Multi-perspective surfacing on a contested ideological turn (demo-queries.sh black-power). Polyphonic check: at least three distinct voices, loose score floor.

queries.query: Dr. Martin Luther King assassination Memphis Lorraine Motel April 1968 grief and reaction
queries.note: Widely-discussed event (precompute_panels.mjs mlk-assassination-1968). Many interviewees recall where they were; only a score floor is safe to assert.

queries.query: voting rights act 1965 federal enforcement preclearance
queries.note: Legislative-outcome retrieval (precompute_panels.mjs voting-rights-act-1965). Confirms the index resolves a policy-level query, not only event narrative.

queries.query: Black Panther Party Oakland armed self-defense police patrols
queries.note: Distinctive west-coast / BPP facet (Aaron Dixon, Elmer Dixon, Kathleen Cleaver cluster). Guards against a reingest that silently drops or mis-embeds the BPP interviews. Score floor only.

queries.query: Highlander Folk School citizenship schools teaching people to read to register to vote
queries.note: Narrow, lower-frequency topic (citizenship-education pipeline). Slightly lower score floor because the vocabulary is specific; presence of any solid match is the signal.

queries.query: sharecropping plantation economy and the cost of registering to vote in the Mississippi Delta
queries.note: Geographic + economic facet (precompute_panels.mjs geography slug mississippi-delta). Deduped multi-voice check on a regionally-anchored theme.

queries.query: March on Washington for Jobs and Freedom August 1963 Lincoln Memorial
queries.note: High-recognition national event (precompute_panels.mjs march-on-washington-1963). Sanity floor that the single most iconic event still retrieves strongly after a reingest.
